columns.description: Same as CID: Customer ID. The eToro platform's primary customer identifier (RealCID from Fact_SnapshotCustomer). HASH distribution key. One or two rows per CID per DateID depending on transfer status. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: CID → RealCID)

Same as TotalLiability: Total liability from open positions. From V_Liabilities.Liabilities. Represents the unrealized obligation (positive = amount owed to customer; negative = customer owes). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: TotalLiability → MaxAnyEquity)

Same as actualNWA: Actual Net Withdrawable Amount. From V_Liabilities.ActualNWA. The amount the customer could withdraw right now. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: actualNWA → MaxAnyEquity)
Date identifier in YYYYMMDD integer format. Clustered index column. The date this balance snapshot represents. Filter on this column for efficient date-range queries. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Same as CID: Customer ID. The eToro platform's primary customer identifier (RealCID from Fact_SnapshotCustomer). HASH distribution key. One or two rows per CID per DateID depending on transfer status. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: CID → RealCID)
Date identifier in YYYYMMDD integer format. Clustered index column. The date this balance snapshot represents. Filter on this column for efficient date-range queries. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Same as actualNWA: Actual Net Withdrawable Amount. From V_Liabilities.ActualNWA. The amount the customer could withdraw right now. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: actualNWA → Equity)

Same as TotalLiability: Total liability from open positions. From V_Liabilities.Liabilities. Represents the unrealized obligation (positive = amount owed to customer; negative = customer owes). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: TotalLiability → Equity)

Same as PositionAmount: Total position amount (sum of all open position values). From Fact_SnapshotEquity.TotalPositionsAmount. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: PositionAmount → EquityCFD)

Same as PositionPNLStocksReal: Position PnL for real (settled) stock positions. Unrealized profit/loss on owned shares. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: PositionPNLStocksReal → EquityRealStocks)
Cash allocated to copy-trading relationships. From V_Liabilities.CashInCopy. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Credit Bureau reporting eligibility flag. 1 = eligible for credit reporting. Inherited from Fact_SnapshotCustomer. Excludes demo non-real accounts, internal labels (26,30), and blocked countries (250). Used by finance for regulatory balance reconciliation. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotCustomer)

Same as NOPStocks: Net Open Position for stock instruments. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: NOPStocks → GapRealStocks)
Cash available for trading. From V_Liabilities.AvailableCash. Free cash not locked in positions or pending cashouts. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Same as TotalRealStocks: Total real stock position value. Sum of position amounts where IsSettled=1 AND InstrumentTypeID IN (5,6) AND NOT futures. Customer owns the underlying shares. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: TotalRealStocks → GapRealStocks)

Same as TotalRealCrypto: Total real crypto position value. Sum of position amounts where IsSettled=1 AND InstrumentTypeID=10. Customer owns the underlying crypto asset. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: TotalRealCrypto → EquityCFD)

Same as PositionPNLStocksReal: Position PnL for real (settled) stock positions. Unrealized profit/loss on owned shares. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: PositionPNLStocksReal → EquityCFD)

Same as TotalRealCrypto: Total real crypto position value. Sum of position amounts where IsSettled=1 AND InstrumentTypeID=10. Customer owns the underlying crypto asset. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: TotalRealCrypto → EquityRealCrypto)

Same as TotalRealStocks: Total real stock position value. Sum of position amounts where IsSettled=1 AND InstrumentTypeID IN (5,6) AND NOT futures. Customer owns the underlying shares. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: TotalRealStocks → EquityCFD)

Same as NOPStocksCFD: NOP for stock CFDs specifically. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: NOPStocksCFD → NOPRealStocks)

Same as PositionPNL: Total position PnL across all asset classes. From V_Liabilities.PositionPnL. Unrealized profit/loss on all open positions. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: PositionPNL → EquityCFD)

Same as PositionPNLCryptoReal: Position PnL for real (settled) crypto positions. Unrealized profit/loss on owned crypto. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: PositionPNLCryptoReal → EquityCFD)

Pending cashout amount not yet finalized. From Fact_SnapshotEquity.InProcessCashouts. Excludes statuses 3=Processed, 4=Cancelled, 5, 6. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity)

Same as PositionPNLCryptoReal: Position PnL for real (settled) crypto positions. Unrealized profit/loss on owned crypto. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: PositionPNLCryptoReal → EquityRealCrypto)

Same as PositionPNLStocksReal: Position PnL for real (settled) stock positions. Unrealized profit/loss on owned shares. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: PositionPNLStocksReal → GapRealStocks)

Same as NOPStocks: Net Open Position for stock instruments. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: NOPStocks → NOPRealStocks)

Same as NOPCrypto: Net Open Position for crypto instruments. From V_Liabilities. Represents the net market exposure in crypto. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: NOPCrypto → GapRealCrypto)

Same as NOPCryptoCFD: NOP for crypto CFDs specifically (not settled/real crypto). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: NOPCryptoCFD → GapRealCrypto)

Same as PositionPNLCryptoReal: Position PnL for real (settled) crypto positions. Unrealized profit/loss on owned crypto. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: PositionPNLCryptoReal → GapRealCrypto)

Total leveraged real crypto loan amount. InitialAmount where IsSettled=1 AND InstrumentTypeID=10 AND Leverage=2. Represents the initial investment in 2x leveraged crypto. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity)
Actual Net Withdrawable Amount. From V_Liabilities.ActualNWA. The amount the customer could withdraw right now. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Same as AvailableCash: Cash available for trading. From V_Liabilities.AvailableCash. Free cash not locked in positions or pending cashouts. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: AvailableCash → TotalCash)

Same as NOPCrypto: Net Open Position for crypto instruments. From V_Liabilities. Represents the net market exposure in crypto. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: NOPCrypto → NOPRealCrypto)

Same as NOPCryptoCFD: NOP for crypto CFDs specifically (not settled/real crypto). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: NOPCryptoCFD → NOPRealCrypto)

Name of the regulatory entity governing this customer row. Values: FCA, CySEC, ASIC, SIBA, SFSA, FSA, etc. Resolved from Dim_Regulation.Name via Fact_SnapshotCustomer.RegulationID. For transfer CIDs, the -1 row shows the previous regulation. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.Regulation)
The business date as a DATE type. Equivalent to DateID but in date format. Computed from @date SP parameter. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Same as NOPStocksCFD: NOP for stock CFDs specifically. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: NOPStocksCFD → GapRealStocks)

Customer ID. The eToro platform's primary customer identifier (RealCID from Fact_SnapshotCustomer). HASH distribution key. One or two rows per CID per DateID depending on transfer status. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Negative portion of total liability. Used in regulatory reporting to isolate client obligations. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Same as TotalRealCrypto: Total real crypto position value. Sum of position amounts where IsSettled=1 AND InstrumentTypeID=10. Customer owns the underlying crypto asset. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: TotalRealCrypto → GapRealCrypto)

Same as TotalRealStocks: Total real stock position value. Sum of position amounts where IsSettled=1 AND InstrumentTypeID IN (5,6) AND NOT futures. Customer owns the underlying shares. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: TotalRealStocks → EquityRealStocks)

Same as CashInCopy: Cash allocated to copy-trading relationships. From V_Liabilities.CashInCopy. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: CashInCopy → TotalCash)

Same as DateID: Date identifier in YYYYMMDD integer format. Clustered index column. The date this balance snapshot represents. Filter on this column for efficient date-range queries. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: DateID → OpeningBalance)
Dormant fee compensation. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE CompensationReasonID IN (30). Refunds of inactivity fees charged to dormant accounts. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Crypto coin transfers. -SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=8 AND IsRedeem=1. Blockchain wallet-to-wallet movements (sign-inverted). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Customer's balance at the start of the business day (in USD). Equals the previous day's ClosingBalance for this CID. Source: V_Liabilities (previous day). For the first row per CID, this is the initial deposit amount. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Unrealized PnL component of regulation transfers. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Total realized PnL. SUM(NetProfit) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID IN (4,5,6,28,40). All closed positions across all asset classes. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Affiliate compensation. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE CompensationReasonID IN (8,51,52). Payouts to affiliate/partner accounts. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Crypto transfer fees. -SUM(Commission) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=30 AND IsRedeem=1. Blockchain network + eToro transfer fees. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Cashout withdrawals. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE (ActionTypeID=8 AND IsRedeem!=1) OR ActionTypeID=45. Excludes crypto redemptions (IsRedeem=1). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Day-over-day change in total unrealized PnL across all asset classes. Key metric for equity volatility tracking. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Customer ID. The eToro platform's primary customer identifier (RealCID from Fact_SnapshotCustomer). HASH distribution key. One or two rows per CID per DateID depending on transfer status. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Overnight/rollover fees. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=35. CFD swap fees charged for holding positions overnight/weekend. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Customer's balance at end of business day (USD). From V_Liabilities. Tomorrow's OpeningBalance = today's ClosingBalance. The cycle equation must hold: OpeningBalance + all flows = ClosingBalance. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Total deposits. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID IN (7,44). Includes both external deposits (7) and internal transfers (44). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Refund amounts. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=12. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Foreclosure amounts. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE CompensationReasonID IN (32). Forced position closures due to margin calls or regulatory requirements. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Loss from chargebacks that could not be recovered. Split by TransferDirection for regulation transfer CIDs. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Chargeback amounts. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID IN (11,13). Disputed deposit reversals. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Lost debt write-off. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE CompensationReasonID IN (31). Uncollectable amounts written off. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Cashout fee. -SUM(Commission) + SUM(CASE WHEN IsRedeem=1 THEN Commission END) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=30. Excludes crypto redemption commissions. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
NWA (Net Withdrawable Amount) component of regulation transfers. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
PnL adjustment compensation. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE CompensationReasonID IN (22). Corrections to realized PnL via compensation mechanism. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Day-over-day change in total unrealized commission. Commission accrued but not yet realized (positions still open). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Deposit-type compensation. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE CompensationReasonID = 7. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Bonus credit amount currently used in open positions. Change metric (day-over-day). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Same as DateID: Date identifier in YYYYMMDD integer format. Clustered index column. The date this balance snapshot represents. Filter on this column for efficient date-range queries. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: DateID → ClosingBalance)
Cashout-type compensation. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE CompensationReasonID IN (33). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Name of the regulatory entity governing this customer row. Values: FCA, CySEC, ASIC, SIBA, SFSA, FSA, etc. Resolved from Dim_Regulation.Name via Fact_SnapshotCustomer.RegulationID. For transfer CIDs, the -1 row shows the previous regulation. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.Regulation)
Liability component of regulation transfers. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

General compensation. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=36 AND CompensationReasonID NOT IN (7,8,11,18,19,22,30,31,32,33,34,36,37,38,40,41,50,51,52). Excluded IDs are captured in dedicated columns (7=CompDeposit, 8/51/52=Affiliate, 11=NegRefill, 19=NWAAdj, 22=PnLAdj, 30=DormantFee, 31=LostDebt, 32=Foreclosure, 33=CompCashout, 41/50=PI). Reason 17 re-included per SR-280376 (Nov 2024). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Other negative balance adjustments not captured in specific columns. Split by TransferDirection for regulation transfer CIDs. Catch-all for miscellaneous balance reductions. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Negative balance protection refill. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE CompensationReasonID IN (11). Platform refills retail client balance to zero after CFD/futures losses exceed available funds. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
PI compensation. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=36 AND CompensationReasonID IN (41,50). Performance Incentive payouts to popular investors. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
NWA adjustment compensation. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE CompensationReasonID IN (19). Adjustments to Net Withdrawable Amount. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Credit Bureau reporting eligibility flag. 1 = eligible for credit reporting. Inherited from Fact_SnapshotCustomer. Excludes demo non-real accounts, internal labels (26,30), and blocked countries (250). Used by finance for regulatory balance reconciliation. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotCustomer)
Actual Net Withdrawable Amount. From V_Liabilities.ActualNWA. The amount the customer could withdraw right now. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Name of the regulatory entity governing this customer row. Values: FCA, CySEC, ASIC, SIBA, SFSA, FSA, etc. Resolved from Dim_Regulation.Name via Fact_SnapshotCustomer.RegulationID. For transfer CIDs, the -1 row shows the previous regulation. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.Regulation)

(Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: TotalRealCrypto → GapRealCrypto)

Same as CashInCopy: Cash allocated to copy-trading relationships. From V_Liabilities.CashInCopy. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: CashInCopy → TotalCash)

Same as PositionPNLStocksReal: Position PnL for real (settled) stock positions. Unrealized profit/loss on owned shares. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: PositionPNLStocksReal → EquityCFD)

Same as NOPCryptoCFD: NOP for crypto CFDs specifically (not settled/real crypto). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: NOPCryptoCFD → GapRealCrypto)

Credit Bureau reporting eligibility flag. 1 = eligible for credit reporting. Inherited from Fact_SnapshotCustomer. Excludes demo non-real accounts, internal labels (26,30), and blocked countries (250). Used by finance for regulatory balance reconciliation. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotCustomer)

Same as TotalRealStocks: Total real stock position value. Sum of position amounts where IsSettled=1 AND InstrumentTypeID IN (5,6) AND NOT futures. Customer owns the underlying shares. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: TotalRealStocks → EquityRealStocks)
Cash available for trading. From V_Liabilities.AvailableCash. Free cash not locked in positions or pending cashouts. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Same as NOPCrypto: Net Open Position for crypto instruments. From V_Liabilities. Represents the net market exposure in crypto. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: NOPCrypto → NOPRealCrypto)

Same as NOPStocksCFD: NOP for stock CFDs specifically. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: NOPStocksCFD → GapRealStocks)

Same as TotalRealCrypto: Total real crypto position value. Sum of position amounts where IsSettled=1 AND InstrumentTypeID=10. Customer owns the underlying crypto asset. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: TotalRealCrypto → EquityCFD)

Same as NOPStocksCFD: NOP for stock CFDs specifically. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: NOPStocksCFD → NOPRealStocks)
Deposit-type compensation. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE CompensationReasonID = 7. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Lost debt write-off. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE CompensationReasonID IN (31). Uncollectable amounts written off. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Same as DateID: Date identifier in YYYYMMDD integer format. Clustered index column. The date this balance snapshot represents. Filter on this column for efficient date-range queries. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: DateID → OpeningBalance)
Day-over-day change in total unrealized commission. Commission accrued but not yet realized (positions still open). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
PnL adjustment compensation. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE CompensationReasonID IN (22). Corrections to realized PnL via compensation mechanism. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Crypto coin transfers. -SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=8 AND IsRedeem=1. Blockchain wallet-to-wallet movements (sign-inverted). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Crypto transfer fees. -SUM(Commission) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=30 AND IsRedeem=1. Blockchain network + eToro transfer fees. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Dividend payments. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=35 AND IsFeeDividend=1. Real stock and ETF holders receive dividends. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Dormant fee compensation. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE CompensationReasonID IN (30). Refunds of inactivity fees charged to dormant accounts. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Unrealized PnL component of regulation transfers. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Cashout withdrawals. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE (ActionTypeID=8 AND IsRedeem!=1) OR ActionTypeID=45. Excludes crypto redemptions (IsRedeem=1). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Refund amounts. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=12. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Cashout-type compensation. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE CompensationReasonID IN (33). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Customer's balance at end of business day (USD). From V_Liabilities. Tomorrow's OpeningBalance = today's ClosingBalance. The cycle equation must hold: OpeningBalance + all flows = ClosingBalance. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Total deposits. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID IN (7,44). Includes both external deposits (7) and internal transfers (44). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

General compensation. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=36 AND CompensationReasonID NOT IN (7,8,11,18,19,22,30,31,32,33,34,36,37,38,40,41,50,51,52). Excluded IDs are captured in dedicated columns (7=CompDeposit, 8/51/52=Affiliate, 11=NegRefill, 19=NWAAdj, 22=PnLAdj, 30=DormantFee, 31=LostDebt, 32=Foreclosure, 33=CompCashout, 41/50=PI). Reason 17 re-included per SR-280376 (Nov 2024). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Fixed ticket fee. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=1000 (synthetic type for fixed-amount ticket fees). Separated from TradingFees per SR-262975 (Jul 2024). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Same as DateID: Date identifier in YYYYMMDD integer format. Clustered index column. The date this balance snapshot represents. Filter on this column for efficient date-range queries. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: DateID → ClosingBalance)
Stamp Duty Reserve Tax (UK). SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=35 AND IsFeeDividend=3. Tax on UK stock purchases. Added Oct 2023. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Liability component of regulation transfers. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Chargeback amounts. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID IN (11,13). Disputed deposit reversals. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Cashout fee. -SUM(Commission) + SUM(CASE WHEN IsRedeem=1 THEN Commission END) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=30. Excludes crypto redemption commissions. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Total realized PnL. SUM(NetProfit) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID IN (4,5,6,28,40). All closed positions across all asset classes. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Negative balance protection refill. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE CompensationReasonID IN (11). Platform refills retail client balance to zero after CFD/futures losses exceed available funds. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Affiliate compensation. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE CompensationReasonID IN (8,51,52). Payouts to affiliate/partner accounts. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
NWA adjustment compensation. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE CompensationReasonID IN (19). Adjustments to Net Withdrawable Amount. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Other negative balance adjustments not captured in specific columns. Split by TransferDirection for regulation transfer CIDs. Catch-all for miscellaneous balance reductions. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Customer's balance at the start of the business day (in USD). Equals the previous day's ClosingBalance for this CID. Source: V_Liabilities (previous day). For the first row per CID, this is the initial deposit amount. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
NWA (Net Withdrawable Amount) component of regulation transfers. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Overnight/rollover fees. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=35. CFD swap fees charged for holding positions overnight/weekend. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Name of the regulatory entity governing this customer row. Values: FCA, CySEC, ASIC, SIBA, SFSA, FSA, etc. Resolved from Dim_Regulation.Name via Fact_SnapshotCustomer.RegulationID. For transfer CIDs, the -1 row shows the previous regulation. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.Regulation)

Customer ID. The eToro platform's primary customer identifier (RealCID from Fact_SnapshotCustomer). HASH distribution key. One or two rows per CID per DateID depending on transfer status. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Segment flag from Fact_SnapshotCustomer. 1 = valid retail customer (not demo, not internal label, not blocked country). Use `WHERE IsValidCustomer = 1` for most analytics. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotCustomer)
PI compensation. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=36 AND CompensationReasonID IN (41,50). Performance Incentive payouts to popular investors. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Loss from chargebacks that could not be recovered. Split by TransferDirection for regulation transfer CIDs. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Day-over-day change in total unrealized PnL across all asset classes. Key metric for equity volatility tracking. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Bonus credit amount currently used in open positions. Change metric (day-over-day). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Credit Bureau reporting eligibility flag. 1 = eligible for credit reporting. Inherited from Fact_SnapshotCustomer. Excludes demo non-real accounts, internal labels (26,30), and blocked countries (250). Used by finance for regulatory balance reconciliation. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotCustomer)
Foreclosure amounts. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE CompensationReasonID IN (32). Forced position closures due to margin calls or regulatory requirements. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
eToro Club tier from Dim_PlayerLevel. Values: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond. Determines benefits such as interest on balance eligibility. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.PlayerLevel)
Bonus credits. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=9. Credit bonus amounts applied to account. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Same as PositionAmount: Total position amount (sum of all open position values). From Fact_SnapshotEquity.TotalPositionsAmount. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: PositionAmount → TotalInvestedAmount)

Same as PositionPNL: Total position PnL across all asset classes. From V_Liabilities.PositionPnL. Unrealized profit/loss on all open positions. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: PositionPNL → TotalPositionPNL)

Same as realizedEquity: Customer settled (realized) equity — the realized portion of customer balance, excluding unrealized PnL on open positions (the unrealized component lives in Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL.PositionPnL). From DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity.RealizedEquity. Together with PositionPnL it sums to Balance per V_Liabilities (Balance = RealizedEquity + PositionPnL). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: realizedEquity → RealizedEquityGlobal)

Same as TotalLiability: Total liability from open positions. From V_Liabilities.Liabilities. Represents the unrealized obligation (positive = amount owed to customer; negative = customer owes). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: TotalLiability → TotalLiabilityGlobal)
Net Open Position for stock instruments. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
NOP for crypto CFDs specifically (not settled/real crypto). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Same as realizedEquity: Customer settled (realized) equity — the realized portion of customer balance, excluding unrealized PnL on open positions (the unrealized component lives in Fact_CustomerUnrealized_PnL.PositionPnL). From DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity.RealizedEquity. Together with PositionPnL it sums to Balance per V_Liabilities (Balance = RealizedEquity + PositionPnL). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: realizedEquity → RealizedEquityTP)

Same as TotalLiability: Total liability from open positions. From V_Liabilities.Liabilities. Represents the unrealized obligation (positive = amount owed to customer; negative = customer owes). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: TotalLiability → TotalEquityTP)
NOP for stock CFDs specifically. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Pending cashout amount not yet finalized. From Fact_SnapshotEquity.InProcessCashouts. Excludes statuses 3=Processed, 4=Cancelled, 5, 6. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity)

Same as actualNWA: Actual Net Withdrawable Amount. From V_Liabilities.ActualNWA. The amount the customer could withdraw right now. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: actualNWA → EquityGlobal)

Same as TotalLiability: Total liability from open positions. From V_Liabilities.Liabilities. Represents the unrealized obligation (positive = amount owed to customer; negative = customer owes). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: TotalLiability → TotalLiabilityTP)
Total Net Open Position across all asset classes. From V_Liabilities.NOP. Net market exposure. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Date identifier in YYYYMMDD integer format. Clustered index column. The date this balance snapshot represents. Filter on this column for efficient date-range queries. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Same as CID: Customer ID. The eToro platform's primary customer identifier (RealCID from Fact_SnapshotCustomer). HASH distribution key. One or two rows per CID per DateID depending on transfer status. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: CID → RealCID)

Same as TotalLiability: Total liability from open positions. From V_Liabilities.Liabilities. Represents the unrealized obligation (positive = amount owed to customer; negative = customer owes). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: TotalLiability → EquityGlobal)

Total leveraged real crypto loan amount. InitialAmount where IsSettled=1 AND InstrumentTypeID=10 AND Leverage=2. Represents the initial investment in 2x leveraged crypto. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New, from DWH_dbo.Fact_SnapshotEquity)
Net Open Position for crypto instruments. From V_Liabilities. Represents the net market exposure in crypto. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Same as actualNWA: Actual Net Withdrawable Amount. From V_Liabilities.ActualNWA. The amount the customer could withdraw right now. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: actualNWA → TotalEquityTP)

Reason 17 re-included per SR-280376 (Nov 2024). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Dormant fee compensation. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE CompensationReasonID IN (30). Refunds of inactivity fees charged to dormant accounts. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Chargeback amounts. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID IN (11,13). Disputed deposit reversals. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
NWA (Net Withdrawable Amount) component of regulation transfers. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Total realized PnL. SUM(NetProfit) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID IN (4,5,6,28,40). All closed positions across all asset classes. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Stamp Duty Reserve Tax (UK). SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=35 AND IsFeeDividend=3. Tax on UK stock purchases. Added Oct 2023. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Total deposits. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID IN (7,44). Includes both external deposits (7) and internal transfers (44). (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
PI compensation. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=36 AND CompensationReasonID IN (41,50). Performance Incentive payouts to popular investors. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Cashout fee. -SUM(Commission) + SUM(CASE WHEN IsRedeem=1 THEN Commission END) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=30. Excludes crypto redemption commissions. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Loss from chargebacks that could not be recovered. Split by TransferDirection for regulation transfer CIDs. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Crypto transfer fees. -SUM(Commission) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=30 AND IsRedeem=1. Blockchain network + eToro transfer fees. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Negative balance protection refill. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE CompensationReasonID IN (11). Platform refills retail client balance to zero after CFD/futures losses exceed available funds. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)
Dividend payments. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=35 AND IsFeeDividend=1. Real stock and ETF holders receive dividends. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Other negative balance adjustments not captured in specific columns. Split by TransferDirection for regulation transfer CIDs. Catch-all for miscellaneous balance reductions. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Same as DividendsPaid: Dividend payments. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=35 AND IsFeeDividend=1. Real stock and ETF holders receive dividends. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: DividendsPaid → RollOverFee)

Same as OvernightFee: Overnight/rollover fees. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=35. CFD swap fees charged for holding positions overnight/weekend. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: OvernightFee → RollOver_and_Divivdends)

Same as CID: Customer ID. The eToro platform's primary customer identifier (RealCID from Fact_SnapshotCustomer). HASH distribution key. One or two rows per CID per DateID depending on transfer status. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: CID → rn)

Name of the regulatory entity governing this customer row. Values: FCA, CySEC, ASIC, SIBA, SFSA, FSA, etc. Resolved from Dim_Regulation.Name via Fact_SnapshotCustomer.RegulationID. For transfer CIDs, the -1 row shows the previous regulation. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.Regulation)

Customer ID. The eToro platform's primary customer identifier (RealCID from Fact_SnapshotCustomer). HASH distribution key. One or two rows per CID per DateID depending on transfer status. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New)

Same as DividendsPaid: Dividend payments. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=35 AND IsFeeDividend=1. Real stock and ETF holders receive dividends. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: DividendsPaid → Divivdends)

Same as OvernightFee: Overnight/rollover fees. SUM(Amount) from Fact_CustomerAction WHERE ActionTypeID=35. CFD swap fees charged for holding positions overnight/weekend. (Tier 2 - SP_Client_Balance_New). (Propagated from main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_client_balance_cid_level_new, rename chain: OvernightFee → RollOverFee)
